mapper.select: SELECT a.*, u.nickname as author_name, u.avatar as author_avatar, c.category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.id = #{articleId} AND a.deleted = 0
SELECT a.*, u.nickname as author_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.author_id = u.id WHERE a.status = 1 AND a.deleted = 0 ORDER BY a.view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT a.*, u.nickname as author_name, c.category_name FROM article a INNER JOIN article_tag at ON a.id = at.article_id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE at.tag_id = #{tagId} AND a.status = 1 AND a.deleted = 0 ORDER BY a.publish_time DESC
